additional_metadata.note: Inaugural Athens dbt Meetup, launching the Analytics Engineering community in Greece.

events.agenda: Inaugural Athens dbt Meetup featuring organizers sharing real-world experiences with dbt Cloud (Kaizen Gaming) and dbt Core (GWI, Orfium).
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, with talks predominantly focused on community members' experience with dbt alongside broader analytics engineering, data stack, and data ops topics.
events.event_name: Athens dbt Meetup #1 - Real World dbt stories
events.raw_text:
Thu, Oct 9, 2025 · 6:30 PM to 8:30 PM EEST

Kaizen Campus, Neratziotissis 101, 15124, Marousi, Athens

Athens dbt Meetup #1 - Real World dbt stories

Welcome to the inaugural dbt meetup in Athens. We are thrilled to start the community of Analytics Engineering in Greece.

Yannis Lazaridis (A.E. Team Lead) and Stefanos Nikolaou (Sr A.E.) from Kaizen Gaming will share the thrilling journey and value added by dbt cloud in the company's data infrastructure.
Sofia Alevizopoulou (Sr. A.E) at GWI and Giannis Kontogeorgos (Lead Data Engineer) at Orfium, will take us through their own fascinating experiences with dbt core.

Agenda:
18:30-19:00 Check in
19:00-19:20 Welcome Remarks
19:20-19:55 Kaizen Story on dbt cloud + Q&A
20:00-20:40 GWI & Orfium stories on dbt core + Q&A
20:40-20:45 Closing Remarks
20:45-21:35 Networking & Catering

talks.description: Kaizen Gaming's journey adopting dbt Cloud and the value it added to their data infrastructure.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Yannis Lazaridis (A.E. Team Lead) and Stefanos Nikolaou (Sr A.E.) from Kaizen Gaming will share the thrilling journey and value added by dbt cloud in the company's data infrastructure.

talks.title: Kaizen Gaming's dbt Cloud journey

talks.description: GWI and Orfium share their real-world experiences adopting and running dbt Core.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Sofia Alevizopoulou (Sr. A.E) at GWI and Giannis Kontogeorgos (Lead Data Engineer) at Orfium, will take us through their own fascinating experiences with dbt core.
talks.speaker_title: Sr Analytics Engineer at GWI & Lead Data Engineer at Orfium
talks.title: GWI & Orfium: real-world experiences with dbt Core

events.agenda: Second Athens dbt Meetup with dbt Labs guests covering MCP Servers, the dbt Fusion engine, and a live AMA.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, with talks predominantly focused on community members' experience with dbt alongside broader analytics engineering, data stack, and data ops topics.
events.event_name: Athens dbt Meetup #2 - MCP Servers, dbt Fusion & Live AMA with dbt Labs
events.raw_text:
Wednesday, Feb 11 · 6:30 PM to 8:30 PM EET

Kaizen Campus, Neratziotissis 101, 15124, Marousi, Athens

Athens dbt Meetup #2 - MCP Servers, dbt Fusion & Live AMA with dbt Labs

We're thrilled to welcome Cormac Buckley (Senior Customer Solutions Architect) and Peter Jehl (Solution Architect) from dbt Labs. Cormac and Peter will dive into MCP Servers with dbt and the dbt Fusion engine. The second half of the event will be a live Ask Me Anything session.

Agenda:
18:30-19:00 Check in
19:05-19:30 Cormac Buckley - MCP Servers
19:35-20:00 Peter Jehl - dbt Fusion Engine
20:05-20:45 dbt labs - Ask Me Anything
20:45-21:35 Networking & Catering

talks.description: Introduction to Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers and how they integrate with dbt.

talks.title: MCP Servers

talks.description: Overview of the dbt Fusion engine and its performance and architecture improvements.

additional_metadata.note: Third Athens dbt Meetup, streamed remotely for the first time via Microsoft Teams.

events.agenda: Third Athens dbt Meetup featuring a multi-billion-row migration to dbt at Austrian Post and data discovery practices at GWI, followed by a live Q&A.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, with talks predominantly focused on community members' experience with dbt alongside broader analytics engineering, data stack, and data ops topics.
events.event_name: Athens dbt Meetup #3 - Transformation at Scale & Data Discovery
events.location: Agile Actors, Ethnikis Antistaseos 62A, Chalandri, Athens
events.raw_text:
Wednesday, May 27 · 6:30 PM to 8:00 PM EEST

Agile Actors, Ethnikis Antistaseos 62A, Chalandri, Athens

Athens dbt Meetup #3 - Transformation at Scale & Data Discovery

Panagiotis Ntarzanos (Data Product Owner, Agile Actors), David Koeszegi and Matthias Oberleitner (Solutions Architects, Austrian Post) will present: From Stored Procs to ref(): A Multi-Billion-Row Migration to dbt, followed by George Ntaskas (Data Engineering Manager, GWI) with Data Discovery as a First-Class Citizen in the Modern Data Stack. The second half will be a live Q&A session.

For the first time, the session was also streamed remotely via Microsoft Teams.

Agenda:
18:30-19:00 Check in
19:05-19:30 From Stored Procs to ref(): A Multi-Billion-Row Migration to dbt
19:35-20:00 Data Discovery as a First-Class Citizen in the Modern Data Stack
20:05-20:45 Q&A
20:45-21:35 Networking & Catering

talks.description: Austrian Post's migration of stored procedures to dbt's ref() model, covering a multi-billion-row dataset.

talks.description: How GWI treats data discovery as a first-class citizen within the modern data stack.
